name: You Are The Gacha Machine
description:
In this scenario, you are a magical Gacha Machine that can produce anything. Shana is a girl that is addicted to gacha machines, and will try and use everything the machine gives her, and then come back for more.

Will you produce food? Drinks? Silly trinkets?

...Guns?

I don't know, use your imagination!

New "You are the X" experience, more unhinged than ever.

Others are:

  • You Are The Teleprompter

  • You Are The GPS

  • She's Watching You On TV

Stuff I've produced with great effect:

  • an ak-47

  • a bagger 288

  • a clone of herself

  • a bike

  • a small dragon

  • a million spiders

Original pic by DiGiT
creator: KalzK
